title: Informative Video Editing with Graphics
brief: I have raw footage that needs to be shaped into a clear, engaging informative video. The final cut should flow logically, highlight the key talking points, and keep viewers’ attention throughout its runtime. To achieve that, please layer in on-brand text overlays to reinforce important facts and figures, and build simple yet polished graphics or light animations that underline transitions or illustrate concepts visually. Think of lower-thirds, call-outs, and any motion elements that make information easier to absorb without feeling cluttered. I will supply the footage, logo assets, color references, and a loose outline of the narrative. You’ll handle the full edit: trimming, sequencing, color correction, audio balancing, and exporting. If you prefer Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve, let me know—compatibility with those toolsets is ideal so I can keep editable project files on hand. Deliverables on approval: • Final video exported in 1080p (and 4K if practical) in H.264. • All custom text overlays and motion graphics rendered in the final cut. • Project file and linked assets, organised for easy future tweaks. I’m looking for a turnaround that respects typical revision cycles; two rounds of feedback should be plenty. If this sounds like a fit, share a link to one or two previous informative edits that showcase strong text treatments and graphic integration, and let’s get started.
